case_title: AMERICAN GENERAL FINANCE VS ANTIPA ALEXANDER T.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $907.67 FILED BY AMERICAN GENERAL FINANCE AS TO DEFENDANT ANTIPA ALEXANDER T. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-29-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ANTIPA ALEXANDER T.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMERICAN GENERAL FINANCE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ANTIPA ALEXANDER T. $907.67 PRINCIPAL, $60.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $968.17 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOT. OF JUDGMENT TO ALEXANDER ANTIPA RETURNED, REFUSED.
